*** 1 FATAL, 3 INJ *** STORM SURVEY RATED AN EF2 WITH MAXIMUM WIND SPEED OF 130 MPH...PEAK LENGTH OF 15.6 MILES...AND PEAK WIDTH OF 300 YARDS. NEAR HUGHES THREE MOBILE HOMES WERE DESTROYED. ROOF DAMAGE OCCURRED TO TWO HOMES AND A BARN WAS DAMAGED. A NUMBER OF IRRIGATION PIVOTS WERE OVERTURNED. NEAR WILDWOOD A METAL SHED WAS DESTROYED. POWER LINES WERE ALSO DAMAGED ALONG THE PATH. BEGAN SIX MILES WEST SOUTHWEST OF HUGHES AND ENDED ONE MILE NORTHWEST OF TARSUS.
